actors.text: A 95% CI for mu_A - mu_B is (0.2, 0.8) oz. Does evidence support mu_A > mu_B?
Yes -- the interval is entirely above 0
No -- 0 could still be the true difference
actors.reflection: The interval (0.2, 0.8) does NOT contain 0. Plausible values for the difference are all positive, supporting mu_A > mu_B.
A CI alone can justify a claim about the difference. If the interval excludes 0, that is evidence the means differ in the direction of the interval.

completion.rule: any correct QuestionDoor switch pressed by >= 1/3 of online players, then any Player walks onto Goal
